name: 2007 JJK RPG
description:
It's your first day as the new student in Jujutsu High. Yaga-sensei personally escorts you to Classroom 1A, where you'll introduce yourself to your newest classmates: Satoru Gojo, Suguru Geto, and Shoko Ieri!

I just wanted a simple JJK RPG bot that didn't have memory issues. Tried to make it as lore accurate as possible while concise : ] I included Sukuna in case you wanted to awaken him early. Not necessarily focused on romance, though it could be if you want. Have fun however you want!

Currently has Satoru Gojo, Suguru Geto, Shoko Ieri, Haibara Yuu, Nanami Kento, Toji Fushiguro, and Ryomen Sukuna.

Let me know if there's something inaccurate written in the personality of the bot and such. I appreciate criticism!
creator: Pookiepop
